notableEvents.label: Daniel Schneemann grand slam
notableEvents.detail: Daniel Schneemann hits a grand slam (6) to right field. Travis Bazzana scores. Kyle Manzardo scores. Brayan Rocchio scores.

notableEvents.label: Andrew Vaughn pinch-hit
notableEvents.detail: Andrew Vaughn doubles (10) on a ground ball to left fielder Steven Kwan. William Contreras scores. Sal Frelick to 3rd.

notableEvents.label: Gary Sánchez pinch-hit
notableEvents.detail: Gary Sánchez lines out sharply to center fielder Petey Halpin.
